testsuite.name: AuditLogService 集成测试

testcase.name: 应该成功记录失败的操作
应该成功获取实体审计历史
应该成功记录操作日志

testsuite.system-out: 2026-03-29 17:22:55.674 [Test worker] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - delete from audit_logs al1_0 Hibernate: delete from audit_logs al1_0 2026-03-29 17:22:55.685 [SimpleAsyncTaskExecutor-1] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - insert into audit_logs (entity_id, entity_type, error_message, operation, operation_detail, operation_time, operator, operator_ip, request_id, status, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into audit_logs (entity_id, entity_type, error_message, operation, operation_detail, operation_time, operator, operator_ip, request_id, status, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) 2026-03-29 17:22:56.691 [Test worker] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - select al1_0.id, al1_0.entity_id, al1_0.entity_type, al1_0.error_message, al1_0.operation, al1_0.operation_detail, al1_0.operation_time, al1_0.operator, al1_0.operator_ip, al1_0.request_id, al1_0.status from audit_logs al1_0 where al1_0.entity_type=?
